name: In Idaho, can employer file against my illness claim?
description: No, claims belong to employees only.[2]

mainEntity.name: In Idaho, can employer file against my illness claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, claims belong to employees only.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, only employees initiate workers' comp claims; employers can't file complaints against you.[2] Idaho Supreme Court ruled it improper.[2] Key factors: (1) employee-owned process; (2) commission jurisdiction limits. Ignore employer filings, assert your rights. Appeal any adverse orders. Protects claimant control.
